qrCodeGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
qrCodeGenerator.subtitle: Generate and download a QR code for a URL or plain text with customizable colors and error resistance.
qrCodeGenerator.textPlaceholder: Enter text or URL to encode
qrCodeGenerator.errorNote: Higher levels allow the QR code to be readable even when damaged or partially obscured, but may result in larger, more complex codes.
qrCodeGenerator.enterTextHint: Enter text or URL to generate QR code

wifiQrGenerator.title: WiFi QR Code Generator
wifiQrGenerator.subtitle: Generate and download QR codes for quick connections to WiFi networks.
wifiQrGenerator.howToUseText: After scanning this QR code with a smartphone camera, users will be prompted to join the WiFi network automatically.
wifiQrGenerator.enterDetailsHint: Enter network details to generate WiFi QR code

cameraRecorder.title: Camera Recorder
cameraRecorder.subtitle: Take pictures or record videos from your webcam or camera.
cameraRecorder.errorAccess: Could not access camera. Please ensure camera permissions are granted.
cameraRecorder.li1: Click "Start Camera" to access your webcam
cameraRecorder.li2: Use "Take Photo" to capture an image
cameraRecorder.li3: Use "Start Recording" to record a video
cameraRecorder.li4: Download your captured media from the preview section
cameraRecorder.noMediaHint: Take a photo or record a video to see it here

imageConverter.title: Image Format Converter
imageConverter.description: Convert images between different formats (PNG, JPEG, WebP, BMP, GIF) with quality control

paintingTool.title: Painting & Drawing
paintingTool.subtitle: Draw and paint with brushes, shapes, text, and layers.
